item.title: #PALLASCAT adorable fact about the Pallas cat, also known as the manul, is its unique facial expression. Pallas cats have a flat, round face with high-set eyes, giving them a perpetual "grumpy" or "angry" look. Despite their seemingly grumpy appearance, t

item.title: 🐾 If you want to understand what pure joy looks like, watch a cat play. There is no worry in those eyes — only focus, excitement, and complete dedication to the moment. 🪶 He does not think about yesterday. He does not worry about tomorrow. He sees a toy,
item.description: By @falsimo1987: 🐾 If you want to understand what pure joy looks like, watch a cat play. There is no worry in those eyes — only focus, excitement, and complete dedication to the moment. 🪶 He does not think about yesterday. He does not worry about tomorrow. He sees a toy,
